name: Barbara
text: All men are mortal. All Greeks are men. Therefore all Greeks are mortal.

name: Celarent
text: No reptiles are warm-blooded. All snakes are reptiles. Therefore no snakes are warm-blooded.

name: Darii
text: All philosophers are thinkers. Some Greeks are philosophers. Therefore some Greeks are thinkers.

name: Camestres
text: All birds have feathers. No spiders have feathers. Therefore no spiders are birds.

name: Baroco
text: All cats are mammals. Some pets are not mammals. Therefore some pets are not cats.

name: Bocardo
text: Some metals are not solid. All metals are elements. Therefore some elements are not solid.

name: Dimaris
text: Some artists are dreamers. All dreamers are humans. Therefore some humans are artists.

name: invalid (illicit major)
text: All dogs are animals. No cats are dogs. Therefore no cats are animals.

name: invalid (undistributed middle)
text: All horses are animals. All dogs are animals. Therefore all dogs are horses.

name: invalid (figure-3 conclusion must be particular)
text: All mammals are animals. All mammals are vertebrates. Therefore all vertebrates are animals.

name: invalid (particular major)
text: Some animals are predators. All cats are animals. Therefore some cats are predators.

name: invalid (illicit process)
text: All squares are rectangles. All rectangles are shapes. Therefore all shapes are squares.
